title: Nguyen Hue Ascends the Throne as Quang Trung
summary: Nguyen Hue was a military genius. After defeating the Siamese army, he ascended the throne as Emperor Quang Trung to mobilize the entire army to drive out the Qing invaders.

slides.text: Nguyen Hue and his two brothers raised the flag of uprising in the land of Tay Son, a name that became famous in history.
slides.imagePrompt: The three Tay Son brothers standing in front of traditional martial arts masters, mountain background, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: At Rach Gam - Xoai Mut, he led the naval and ground forces to a heroic victory over 50,000 Siamese troops.
slides.imagePrompt: Naval battle on the Mekong river, Tay Son fleet winning, great heroism, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: In 1788, when the Qing invaders swarmed in, he ascended the throne at Mount Ban to officially lead the resistance.
slides.imagePrompt: Coronation of King Quang Trung at Mount Ban, huge crowd, solemn atmosphere, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: King Quang Trung is a symbol of the unyielding spirit and the will to victory of our nation.
slides.imagePrompt: Heroic portrait of King Quang Trung, symbols of victory and power, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.question: Where did Nguyen Hue ascend the throne as Emperor?
The three Tay Son brothers were Nguyen Hue, Nguyen Nhac, and who else?
